job_description:
# Healthcare ETL Tester
Company: Dotcom Team, LLC
Source: Dice
Employment type: Contract
Checked: April 27, 2026
URL: https://www.dice.com/job-detail/dc028ea1-9db7-4945-961d-ba6a477815d0

## Highlights
- Remote healthcare ETL QA tester role.
- Posted 34 minutes ago.
- Emphasizes ETL design review, test cases and plans, data warehouse testing, SQL validation, reconciliation, completeness, accuracy, integrity checks, and defect tracking.
- Very strong match to ETL QA / data validation keywords and current experience.
strengths: Excellent overlap with ETL validation, SQL, reconciliation, defect tracking, and data warehouse testing.
Healthcare claims/provider/eligibility data familiarity maps well.
gaps: Mentions code review participation and automation exposure not heavily foregrounded on the resume.
Contract QA tester framing is narrower than broader analyst profile.
notes: High-fit ETL QA role. Tailor for ETL testing, data quality checks, reconciliation, test plans, SQL, and regulated healthcare data validation.

replacements.find: ETL Analyst | Healthcare Data Analyst | Data Quality & Warehouse Analyst
replacements.replace: Healthcare ETL Tester | Data Validation Analyst | SQL QA Analyst

replacements.find: Healthcare Data & ETL Analyst with 7+ years of experience validating, reconciling, and delivering trusted enterprise data across healthcare (payer), banking, retail, and e-commerce domains. Deep hands-on expertise in advanced SQL, ETL validation, source-to-target testing, data quality, data warehousing, and production data support. Currently extending core skills into Snowflake, Databricks, Azure Data Factory, and Python to support cloud modernization and AI-ready data pipelines. Proven partner to engineering, QA, and business stakeholders—translating mapping documents and business rules into validation frameworks that protect reporting accuracy, regulatory compliance, and downstream analytics readiness.
replacements.replace: Healthcare Data & ETL Analyst with 7+ years of experience validating, reconciling, and testing trusted enterprise data across healthcare and other complex domains. Deep hands-on expertise in advanced SQL, ETL validation, source-to-target testing, data quality, data warehousing, and production data support. Strong fit for healthcare ETL QA roles that require reconciliation, completeness checks, integrity testing, and defect resolution.

replacements.find: Source-to-target testing, record counts, duplicate / null / referential / business-rule checks, root-cause analysis, defect triage
replacements.replace: Source-to-target testing, record counts, duplicate / null / referential / business-rule checks, root-cause analysis, defect triage, reconciliation and integrity testing
